changes.comment: Add @fgv/ts-agent-memory-sqlite-vec: a persistent, sqlite-vec-backed IVectorIndex reference implementation for @fgv/ts-agent-memory. Embeddings live in a SQLite file (better-sqlite3 + sqlite-vec vec0), so a reopened vault answers queries with no re-embedding — the durable counterpart to InMemoryCosineIndex, with no core store change. Result-integration boundary; better-sqlite3 / sqlite-vec are peer dependencies.
